label: The Prismwake
description: The Prismwake is a lateen-rigged sailing vessel adapted to Lacrymara’s glass-dusted twilight seas, its hull sheathed in dull black resin to suppress glare from the planet’s reflective particulates. A lattice of refractive vanes rises above the mainmast, sorting copper-white radiance into narrow bands that mark heading against the planet’s seam-lined horizons. The deck fittings are low and sealed, with covered scuppers and gasketed lockers designed to exclude electrostatically charged glass dust. Along the rails, grounded conductor-strips bleed accumulated charge into the sea, keeping the rigging stable under the planet’s faint auroral girdle.
